arts.sum: An exception to this limit applies to countries with multiple continental champions in the years leading up to the Club World Cup, which has benefited Brazilian teams (Palmeiras, Flamengo, Fluminense, and Botafogo) and Mexican teams (León, Monterrey, and Pachuca).
